input.question: Compare average grades between winter and summer semesters

payload.question: Compare average grades between winter and summer semesters

output.sql:
WITH season_averages AS (
  SELECT
    CASE
      WHEN lower(semester) LIKE '%winter%' THEN 'Winter'
      WHEN lower(semester) LIKE '%summer%' THEN 'Summer'
      ELSE NULL
    END AS season,
    AVG(grade) AS avg_grade,
    COUNT(*) AS count_records
  FROM enrollments
  WHERE lower(semester) LIKE '%winter%' OR lower(semester) LIKE '%summer%'
  GROUP BY season
)
SELECT
  season AS season,
  avg_grade AS avg_grade,
  count_records AS count_records
FROM season_averages
WHERE season IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY avg_grade DESC;

visualization.description: Compare average grades between Winter and Summer semesters
visualization.title: Average Grade: Winter vs Summer Semesters

payload.sql:
WITH season_averages AS (
  SELECT
    CASE
      WHEN lower(semester) LIKE '%winter%' THEN 'Winter'
      WHEN lower(semester) LIKE '%summer%' THEN 'Summer'
      ELSE NULL
    END AS season,
    AVG(grade) AS avg_grade,
    COUNT(*) AS count_records
  FROM enrollments
  WHERE lower(semester) LIKE '%winter%' OR lower(semester) LIKE '%summer%'
  GROUP BY season
)
SELECT
  season AS season,
  avg_grade AS avg_grade,
  count_records AS count_records
FROM season_averages
WHERE season IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY avg_grade DESC;
